purpose: Canonical hardware fleet registry (CMDB) for NAUTILUS — every compute unit, its specs, role, network, power, and onboarding status. Superset of labwatch/hardware.json (which is the inference-cost subset: the 3 Mac Minis only).
variant: no-floor + Variant-A consolidation (no always-on local LLM until the planned 64GB node; clouds carry inference; ALL always-on local work consolidated on the M4; both M2s sold) — see workloads.json + MIGRATION_PLAN.md

tiers.workstation: dev-only, MUST host zero always-on services
tiers.local_always_on: the single M4 node (gateway+labwatch+STT+ingest) now; inference floor (64GB node) later
tiers.iot: room/edge devices + power & WAN resilience infrastructure (mic, UPS, cellular router, satellite fallback, displays, sensors) — not compute nodes; mostly pending onboarding or shopping

units.label: Surface Laptop Studio 2

power.note: battery wear, Win update reboots, thermal throttling — NEVER a production/always-on server (SOVRN principle)

units.role_now: primary dev + ALL local servers (llama-server 30B, LiteLLM, labwatch, vault_watcher, docker stack, Hermes, Ollama)
units.role_target: pure dev workstation + OPTIONAL on-demand 30B power tier (llama-server) when powered on; zero always-on dependencies. In the no-floor interim the Surface 30B is the ONLY local inference until the 64GB node lands.

units.label: Mac Mini M4 16GB

net.static: manual IP set on Wi-Fi service 2026-06-14 (mask 255.255.255.0, router .254, DNS .254+1.1.1.1) — survives reboot/room-move on same SSID; no router reservation needed
net.mac_wifi_private: 6e:0a:c0:96:8a:5c (router-visible; rotates — moot now IP is manual)
net.note: FileVault OFF. On Wi-Fi (no Ethernet cable). For max stability later: plug Ethernet (en0) + re-apply manual IP to the Ethernet service.

units.role_now: ALWAYS-ON NODE LIVE — 3 LaunchDaemons: LiteLLM gateway :4000 (LAN), labwatch :4002 (127.0.0.1), Parakeet STT :4100 (LAN, parakeet-tdt-0.6b-v3). Verified: Windows→M4 gateway→free-cloud completion OK; STT transcribes (1.6s). Scoped sudoers (pmset/launchctl/network), broad removed. PENDING (user): router DHCP reservation for .148; Surface-off cutover test; wire Echo→M4 STT.

services.litellm: 0.0.0.0:4000 (LaunchDaemon com.sovern.litellm; .env.gateway sourced; ⚠ no master_key — LAN-trust; add LITELLM_MASTER_KEY to harden)

units.role_target: ALWAYS-ON LOCAL NODE (consolidated, Variant A) — LiteLLM gateway + labwatch + STT (Parakeet) + KG ingest worker (+ Hermes?). NO local LLM floor (no-floor variant) so all of this fits 16GB (~6.5GB steady / ~9GB peak). The single always-on local box; the 2× M2 are sold. When the 64GB node arrives it takes the inference floor; the M4 keeps gateway+edge. SINGLE POINT OF FAILURE for the local tier — accepted (cloud backstop covers inference if M4 is down).
units.model_class: Could run 8-14B on-demand for dev, but is NOT the always-on floor. CANNOT host 30B (30B-A3B Q4 ≈ 18GB > 16GB unified + macOS) — that's the 64GB node's job.

units.label: Mac Mini M2 8GB #1 (SOVERN-01)
units.role_target: RESALE (Variant A consolidation). All edge work (STT, KG ingest) fits the M4 alongside the control plane with no local LLM, so the M2s have no role. Sell — labwatch verdict: M2 8GB don't pay off as inference. Wipe + deregister from DHCP/SSH config first.

units.label: Mac Mini M2 8GB #2 (SOVERN-02)
units.blocker: Stuck at FileVault pre-boot login screen — no kernel/network → SSH/VNC/ARD unavailable. To wipe for resale: boot to Recovery (power + hold), Disk Utility erase, or DFU-restore via Apple Configurator on another Mac.
units.role_target: RESALE (Variant A). Never needed onboarding — no edge role in the consolidated topology. Don't spend effort unblocking for service; just wipe (Recovery erase) and sell.

units.label: Hetzner CX22 (SOVERN-HUB)
units.role_now: public prod: n8n, Langfuse v2, Dokploy, CF tunnel, Postgres
units.role_target: PUBLIC CLOUD TIER — n8n prod, Langfuse, Dokploy, CF tunnel; candidate host for KG Neo4j IF upgraded (CX22 4GB has no headroom; Neo4j+APOC needs ~2GB → consider CX32/CX42).
units.upgrade_note: 4GB RAM nearly full (n8n+Langfuse+PG+Dokploy+tunnel). Langfuse v3 (+ClickHouse) and Neo4j both need more — size up before adding either.

units.label: Planned 64GB+ inference node (SHOPPING)

power.note: must be always-on friendly (low idle, no thermal/battery issues)

units.role_target: ALWAYS-ON LOCAL INFERENCE FLOOR — runs a capable model (30B-A3B comfortably, 70B-Q4 feasible). Restores SOVRN principle #1 (offline autonomy) properly. Sits behind the M4 gateway; M4 keeps the control plane.

buying_criteria.what_matters: For LLM, it's Apple unified memory OR GPU VRAM that runs the model — NOT system RAM next to a small GPU.
buying_criteria.recommended: Apple Silicon 64GB+ unified — Mac Studio M4 Max 64GB, Mac Mini M4 Pro 64GB, or used M1/M2 Max Studio 64GB. Unified = usable model memory, Metal supported, tiny idle power, fits existing Mac ops. 30B-A3B (MoE, 3B active) runs fast; 64GB opens 70B-Q4.
buying_criteria.x86_gpu: Only worth it if GPU VRAM ≥24GB (RTX 3090/4090 → 30B-Q4 on-GPU; 70B needs 2×24GB or 48GB). 64GB RAM + 8GB GPU = CPU-only 30B (too slow).
buying_criteria.avoid: 64GB system RAM with no real GPU — CPU inference of 30B too slow for an always-on floor.
buying_criteria.rule_of_thumb: VRAM/unified ≥ (model size at Q4) + ~20%. 30B-A3B Q4 ≈18GB → 32GB floor, 64GB comfortable + 70B headroom.

peripherals.label: SanDisk 4TB Extreme portable SSD
peripherals.role: mirrored vault / graphiti dumps / model weights

iot.label: Omnidirectional room microphone
iot.role: whole-room far-field voice capture → feeds the M4 STT service (Parakeet :4100, garage/stt_server.py) for ambient dictation / meeting capture without a headset
iot.note: want true omni / far-field pickup for the whole room; USB or networked input that the M4 can read.

iot.label: UPS (battery backup)
iot.role: ride-through power for the always-on local tier (M4 ~30W) + network gear (router/modem) so the lab survives brownouts/short outages; clean-shutdown signal
iot.note: size for M4 + networking load; pure sine-wave preferred. Directly supports the laptop-independence goal (always-on node stays up through outages).

iot.label: NETGEAR Nighthawk M6 Pro (5G mobile hotspot) — unlocked
iot.role: SIM travel router / cellular WAN: portable hotspot for travel AND backup uplink for the LAN if home broadband drops
iot.note: unlocked (carrier-agnostic SIM). Primary WAN-failover candidate ahead of Starlink. Onboard: SIM/plan, set as failover WAN behind the router.

iot.label: Starlink (satellite WAN fallback)
iot.role: satellite WAN fallback for full-internet redundancy when both home broadband and cellular (M6 Pro) are down
iot.note: redundancy tier-3 / wishlist — only if cellular failover proves insufficient. Highest-cost, lowest-priority of the WAN options.

iot.label: Digital display banner
iot.role: wall/desk signage surface — status dashboards (labwatch), now-playing, alerts/notifications
iot.note: form factor TBD (LED banner vs e-ink vs small panel).

iot.label: Smart supplements scale
iot.role: precision scale for supplement dosing; readings feed the Wellbeing EMR supplements system
iot.note: want connected/exportable readings, not a dumb scale.
